articles.title: Maharashtra monsoon delayed, heatwave alert for Mumbai | Tap to know more | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.full_text:
Maharashtra monsoon delayed, heatwave alert for Mumbai
Maharashtra's monsoon advance has slowed, delaying its arrival in Mumbai and nearby regions. A low-pressure system over the Bay of Bengal may help revive monsoon movement in the coming days. Meanwhile, several districts, including Mumbai, Thane, Pune and Nashik, remain under a Yellow Alert for heatwave conditions, with only isolated rainfall expected through the weekend.
